briefdescription.para: The IP and port of the host address of the session. This will be a loopback on P2P relay sessions, or will be an actual ip:port for dedicated/LAN sessions.
Remote ID of the P2P connection peer.
Mapping of user IDs to the index representing the team they are on, usually will be zero or one.
Array of multiple players to represent a party.

detaileddescription.para: Delegate for when we get team information for a session, should be subscribed to on the game server side
Delegate for when we get party information for a session, should be subscribed to on the game server side

briefdescription.para: Get the Remote ID of the P2P connection peer.
Set the Remote ID of the P2P connection peer.
Whether or not we have information regarding teams for this session's information, will only be true if this is a matchmaking session.
Attempts to get a team index for a user, returns INDEX_NONE if not found.

detaileddescription.para: Note that team indices are just mapped from 0 to how ever many teams are matched. If you have special team numbers you'll want to map these values on the client side.

briefdescription.para: Whether or not we have information regarding parties for this session, will only be true if this is a matchmaking session.
